emails.body: Jim has mentioned a meeting next week with all of us to talk about strategy, etc. over the next many months. Might be a good opportunity to clarify how we coordinate on these matters. "Mary Hain" <Mary.Hain@enron.com> on 08/30/2000 12:43:58 PM
